name: jyut-ocr-proofread
description: Proofread historical Chinese OCR Markdown against same-name PDFs, with Cantonese jyut-ocr conventions for page furniture, old glyphs, lists, tables, final audit checks, and GJ.cool as an optional short-deadline helper.

interface.shortDescription: Proofread Chinese OCR Markdown against PDFs.
interface.longDescription: Use a Cantonese jyut-ocr proofreading workflow for historical Chinese OCR Markdown: compare same-name PDFs, preserve printed glyph variants and old punctuation, remove OCR/page furniture, repair low-confidence and high-confidence OCR mistakes, reconstruct headings, lists, and tables, follow bundled detailed rules for long reports, and treat GJ.cool OCR only as an optional short-deadline helper.
defaultPrompt: 校對一份 jyut-ocr Markdown，逐頁對同名 PDF。
清理 OCR 頁面家具同低信心括號。
逐頁檢查歷史中文 OCR 轉寫。
